channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI Actor Tilly Norwood to Star in First Feature Film
item.description: AI-generated actor Tilly Norwood will appear in her first feature film, with her creator noting that "art will be imitating life."

item.title: Inmate admits to killing his wife and promises to disclose body location
item.description: Delphine Jubillar disappeared in southern France in December 2020 during the COVID-19 pandemic, and her remains have not been recovered.

item.title: Beyoncé drops her first new track in two years
item.description: Beyoncé released her first new song in two years, "MORNING DEW (DONK)," on Independence Day. USA Today Network music reporter Caché McClay discusses...

item.title: Six-year-old drowns at New York beach after being swept away by strong current
item.description: The girl and her family were visiting Southampton beach on the Fourth of July.
